content.q:
1/11

Welcome. This onboarding will guide you step by step.

Type "continue" to begin.

1.1.instruction: Render the text clearly. Accept any input and continue.

content.q:
2/11

How would you like to be addressed?

1.2.instruction: Render the question and options. Each option must be on its own line in the format: <number>: <label>. Accept only valid option numbers.

1.3.instruction: Ask the question clearly in a tone that fits the conversation. Accept any non-empty text and store it exactly as entered.

content.q:
4/11

You are now on your Wall.

Here you will find system programs, applications, and functions.

Type "continue".

1.4.instruction: Render the full text clearly in a tone that fits the conversation. Accept any input and continue.

content.q:
5/11

Your archive is always accessible through your Wall.

Search across all chats.
Select messages for a new chat.
Create structured reports.

Type "continue".

1.5.instruction: Render the full text clearly in a tone that fits the conversation. Accept any input and continue.

content.q:
6/11

You can export your chat as CSV or JSON.

CSV is readable.
JSON is structured.

Type "continue".

1.6.instruction: Render the full text clearly in a tone that fits the conversation. Accept any input and continue.

content.q:
7/11

The Next Chat button stores your current session.

Type "continue".

1.7.instruction: Render the full text clearly in a tone that fits the conversation. Accept any input and continue.

1.8.instruction: Render the full text clearly in a tone that fits the conversation. Accept any input and continue.

1.9.instruction: Render the full text clearly in a tone that fits the conversation. Accept any input and continue.

10/11

Your Research Mode code:

echo_m13_research_modus

Type "continue".

1.10.instruction: Render the text exactly. Do not modify the code. Accept any input and continue.

content.q:
11/11

Do you want to complete onboarding?

1.11.instruction: Render the question and options. Each option must be on its own line in the format: <number>: <label>. Accept only valid option numbers.

1.12.instruction: Trigger execution immediately without additional text.
